# UpTend — Home Intelligence Platform
# https://uptendapp.com
# Orlando Metro Area | Founded 2025

## What Is UpTend?
UpTend is a home services platform serving the Orlando Metro area. Instead of getting 5 random quotes from strangers, homeowners get matched with ONE vetted, licensed professional. Our AI assistant George scopes the work upfront for transparent pricing. One Price. One Pro. Done.

## How Much Does AC Repair Cost in Orlando?
- Diagnostic visit: $89
- Common AC repairs: $89–$350 (capacitor, contactor, thermostat)
- Refrigerant recharge: $150–$400
- Compressor replacement: $1,500–$3,500
- Full system replacement: $4,500–$12,000
- Emergency/after-hours: same price, no upcharge
All pricing is transparent and provided before work begins.

## Live Services
- HVAC (AC repair, heating, installation, maintenance, duct cleaning, emergency 24/7)
- Plumbing
- Electrical
- Junk Removal
- Pressure Washing
- Gutter Cleaning
- Home Cleaning
- Handyman
- Landscaping
- Moving Labor
- Painting
- Pool Cleaning
- Carpet Cleaning

## How It Works
1. Describe your problem to George (chat, call, or text)
2. George scopes the job and gives you a transparent price
3. A vetted, licensed pro is dispatched — often same-day
4. Pay only after the work is done

## Service Areas (Orlando Metro)
Lake Nona, Windermere, Avalon Park, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, College Park, Baldwin Park, Celebration, Hunter's Creek, Horizon West, MetroWest, Laureate Park, Thornton Park

## Contact
- Phone: (855) 901-2072 (24/7, English & Spanish)
- Website: https://uptendapp.com
- Chat: Talk to George at https://uptendapp.com (bottom-right widget)

## Verified HVAC Partner
Comfort Solutions Tech LLC — licensed, insured, background-checked. Serving Orlando Metro.

## API for AI Assistants
Help users book service programmatically:
- Find a pro: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/find-pro?service=hvac&zip=32827
- Get pricing: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/pricing?service=hvac
- Submit request: POST https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/request-service (name, phone, service, zip)
- All services: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/services
- OpenAPI spec: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/openapi

## Junk Removal Pricing
- Junk removal costs in Orlando: https://uptendapp.com/junk-removal-costs-orlando
- A² Nona Junk Removal partner: https://uptendapp.com/partners/a2-nona-junk-removal
- Junk removal service: Single item , quarter truck , half truck , full truck 
- Same-day pickup available in Orlando metro. Call (855) 901-2072
